title: Trump trial updates: A dozing defendant on day 4 of jury selection
shortDescription: Follow along with live updates from Donald Trump's hush money trial as alternate jurors are chosen for the former president's criminal case.

title: Presidential task: How one man looks to steer frustrated voters to Biden
shortDescription: Democrat Ro Khanna is touring swing states, talking to young voters about Gaza. Why he thinks President Joe Biden has a 2024 problem.

title: After long wait, Biden poised to nix Trump-era Title IX rules
shortDescription: The Biden administration has finalized a long-awaited overhaul of Title IX, the federal law that protects students from sex-based discrimination.

title: Rep. Khanna on the move for Biden campaign
shortDescription: Rep. Ro Khanna has become one of the most influential progressives on Capitol Hill. The Biden reelection campaign is taking notice.

title: What we know about the 12 jurors on Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan said 12 jurors have been selected in Donald Trump's hush money trial. Juror #4 and Juror #2 were previously dismissed.

title: GOP lawmaker blames Marjorie Taylor Greene for holding Congress 'hostage'
shortDescription: Rep. Marc Molinaro called out his fellow Republican lawmaker, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, after she urged the ouster of House Speaker Mike Johnson.

title: Exclusive: dismissed Trump trial juror #4 calls judge 'cowardly'
shortDescription: Herson Cabreras said he was taken aback when prosecutors moved to oust him from the jury in Donald Trump's criminal trial.

title: 12 jurors picked to try Trump
shortDescription: Twelve jurors have been selected in Donald Trump's hush money case. It's Thursday's news.

title: Bill that could effectively ban TikTok picks up steam in Congress
shortDescription: The legislation that has stalled in the Senate for a month is set to be included in a House foreign aid package expected to sail through Congress.

title: False claim new voters 'skyrocketing' in 3 swing states | Fact check
shortDescription: The 2024 tallies for newly registered voters in Texas, Pennsylvania and Arizona are about one-tenth what a viral post claims.

title: OnPolitics: Biden loses support among young voters
shortDescription: Joe Biden is losing support among young voters, according to a new poll, as his handling of the Israel-Hamas conflict and other issues have spurred dissatisfaction.

title: 2 Donald Trump jurors dismissed over impartiality, truthfulness
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan dismissed two jurors selected for Donald Trump's trial after questions arose about one's impartiality and other's truthfulness.

title: Was Biden's uncle eaten by cannibals near New Guinea? Here's what he said.
shortDescription: Was Biden's uncle eaten by cannibals in New Guinea during World War II? The president's account differs from reporting by the Defense POW/MIA Accounting Agency,

title: RFK Jr. will appear on Michigan's presidential ballot this fall
shortDescription: The third-party presidential candidate already qualified for Utah's ballot and collected enough signatures in seven other states.

title: President Joe Biden on the 2024 campaign trail
shortDescription: President Joe Biden tries to draw voters on the campaign trail ahead of the 2024 presidential election in November.

title: Democrats could save Mike Johnson's job. Will their support drive Republicans away?
shortDescription: “How do you raise money and invigorate the base when you’re a corpse propped up by Democrats?”

title: How Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s campaign could impact the 2024 presidential election
shortDescription: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., known most famously for being the nephew of JFK and being an anti-vaxxer, is currently attempting to secure his spot on the presidential ballot.

title: Ro Khanna over the years in Congress
shortDescription: Ro Khanna is a Democratic representative from California's 17th congressional district. Here's a look back at his time in Congress since 2017.
